text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho and Satono
Diamond is cool and collected. She hasn't said
the word jinx even once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's incredibly focused, even in the paddock.
Sensing that Satono Diamond's going to put on a
great race, Kitasan Black gives her approval from
the stands.
